pcre.description: Interpret pattern as a Perl-compatible regular expression (PCRE)

extended_regex.description: Interpret pattern as an extended regular expression (ERE)

recursive.description: Read all files under each directory recursively

line_number.description: Prefix each line of output with the 1-based line number within its file

count.description: Print only the count of matching lines per file

files_with_matches.description: Print only the names of files containing matches

null_delim.description: Output NUL byte after each filename instead of newline

include.description: Search only files matching the given glob pattern

exclude_dir.description: Skip directories matching the given glob pattern during recursive search

color.description: Surround matching strings with ANSI color escape sequences (auto/always/never)
